title: viola wansanensis
intro: Viola wansanensis, also known as the Wansan viola, is a species of flowering plant in the viola genus native to Korea. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, thanks to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Viola wansanensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
